justification_text: Aluminium fluoride has its own line 2826.12. 2826.90 is the residual line for fluorosilicates/fluoroaluminates/complex fluoro-salts, not binary metal fluorides. Classified under HS 2826.12.
tier1_description: An aluminium-fluoride (AlF3) sputtering target used to deposit low-refractive-index thin films by physical vapour deposition. With an ultra-wide bandgap and a refractive index around 1.3 to 1.4, the films act as anti-reflection and protective optical coatings on lenses and components and as low-loss dielectric layers. Compatible with RF magnetron and reactive sputtering onto optical substrates. Part number TA0703

justification_text: A simple binary metal fluoride (BaF2, CeF3, LaF3, MgF2, NaF, etc.) is 2826.19 ("fluorides: other"); 2826.90 is reserved for fluorosilicates/fluoroaluminates/complex salts. Classified under HS 2826.19.
tier1_description: A barium-fluoride (BaF2) sputtering target used to deposit thin optical films that are transparent from the ultraviolet through the infrared with a low refractive index. The coatings serve as anti-reflection layers, beam splitters and protective films on infrared windows and lenses for thermal-imaging and optical systems. Suitable for physical-vapour-deposition onto a range of substrates. Part number TA0920

justification_text: A simple binary metal fluoride (BaF2, CeF3, LaF3, MgF2, NaF, etc.) is 2826.19 ("fluorides: other"); 2826.90 is reserved for fluorosilicates/fluoroaluminates/complex salts. Classified under HS 2826.19.

Compatible with RF magnetron and reactive sputtering onto optical substrates. Part number TA4010

tier1_description: A ceramic aluminium-nitride (AlN) sputtering target used as source material in physical-vapour-deposition systems to grow thin AlN films. Exploiting the material's wide bandgap, high thermal conductivity and electrical insulation, the deposited films serve in optoelectronic, acoustic-resonator and dielectric-barrier applications. Compatible with reactive DC and RF magnetron sputtering onto a variety of substrates. Part number TA0705
